title: Parity Test Pipeline Parameters
description: Schema for the feature-parity test pipeline. Exercises parameter schema hover, completion, and validation.

input_dir.description: Path to the directory containing input FASTQ files.

output_dir.description: Path to the directory where pipeline results will be written.

genome.description: Reference genome identifier used for read alignment.

reads.description: Glob pattern for paired-end FASTQ input files.

max_cpus.description: Maximum number of CPUs available to any single process.

max_memory.description: Maximum memory available to any single process (Nextflow memory unit).

max_time.description: Maximum wall-clock time for any single process (Nextflow time unit).
